sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Flying Kick
special_mechanics.description: Captain America and Hawkeye can perform a flying kick attack during jumps

special_mechanics.name: Energy Beam Attack
special_mechanics.description: Iron Man and Vision fire energy beams at 45-degree angle during jumps

special_mechanics.name: Flying Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Occasional side-scrolling flying and shooting sequences. Iron Man and Vision fly on their own; Captain America and Hawkeye use flying machines

special_mechanics.name: Avenger Attack
special_mechanics.description: Ranged special attack using projectile weapons (Captain America's shield, Hawkeye's arrows) or energy beams (Iron Man, Vision)

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative): This is a port of the 1991 arcade beat 'em up developed by Realtime Associates for SNES in 1993. Available sources contain only high-level gameplay descriptions and development credits. No quantitative physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or detailed movement mechanics are documented. The game is a side-scrolling beat 'em up/platformer hybrid with beat 'em up emphasis rather than precision platforming focus.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Captain America and The Avengers (SNES)
Wikipedia - Captain America and The Avengers
